name: Sierra Metals Inc.
description: Sierra Metals Inc. is a Canadian-based polymetallic mining company focused on the production, exploration, and development of precious and base metals. The company operates primarily in Peru and Mexico, with key assets including the Yauricocha Mine in Peru and the Bolivar and Cusi Mines in Mexico. Sierra Metals is dedicated to increasing production volumes and expanding its mineral resources, with a primary focus on the extraction of copper, silver, lead, zinc, and gold deposits to drive growth and value for its stakeholders.
